issues.title: Missing page title
issues.description: The page does not have a descriptive <title> element.
issues.recommendation: Add a concise, descriptive <title> that reflects the page content.

issues.title: Missing language attribute
issues.description: The <html> element is missing a lang attribute.
issues.recommendation: Add a lang attribute to the <html> element (e.g., lang="en").
issues.element:
London

London is the capital of England.

Paris

Paris is the capital of France.

Tokyo

Tokyo is the capital of Japan.

issues.title: Missing primary heading
issues.description: The page does not contain an <h1> heading.
issues.recommendation: Add a single <h1> heading that describes the page topic.

issues.title: No skip navigation link found
issues.description: Skip links help keyboard users bypass repetitive content.
issues.recommendation: Add a skip link at the beginning of the page: Skip to main content

issues.title: Missing main landmark
issues.description: Pages should include a main landmark region.
issues.recommendation: Add a <main> element or element with role="main" for the main content.

issues.title: No viewport meta tag
issues.description: Viewport meta tag helps with responsive design and zoom on mobile.

html_content:
London

London is the capital of England.

Paris

Paris is the capital of France.

Tokyo

Tokyo is the capital of Japan.
